ogTitle: Kardella South vs Karnak: Climate Safety

heading: Kardella South vs Karnak — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Kardella South, Victoria and Karnak, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Kardella South and Karnak have similar overall climate risk scores.

faq.question: Is Kardella South or Karnak safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Kardella South has a flood risk score of 59/100, while Karnak scores 58/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Kardella South scores 51/100 for bushfire risk. Karnak scores 45/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Kardella South or Karnak?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Kardella South has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.55% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
